## OneThird Algebraic Program — ARC-CLOSE achieved

### Reference bars (six cleanly named, ascending Q)

| Bar | Family | Status | Witness |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1/3 ≈ 0.33333 | global textbook tight | settled theorem | `point ‖ (y<z)` (width-≤2 gadget) |
| 6/17 ≈ 0.35294 | **width-3 (full arena)** | **empirical + conditional analytic** | n=10 self-dual (e=187, binding (3,9) Pr=11/17); n=11 non-self-dual via T6 extension; 71,512 σ-iso + 3.16M full-arena iso-classes confirm |
| 134/375 ≈ 0.35733 | odd-n self-dual | empirical (OFF-LADDER, k=125/9) | n=11/13 (e=750); parallel to 6/17 even-n thread |
| 4/11 ≈ 0.36364 | descent ladder k=11 | empirical + closed-form | (1,3,1) order polytope, e=11, n=5 |
| 14/39 ≈ 0.35897 | descent ladder k=13 | empirical + closed-form | n=7 (e=39), debunked as 8/21 SP successor by Prong 3C |
| 8/21 ≈ 0.38095 | **width-3 SP** | **analytic theorem SHARP** | T*=G⊕G‖point (Prong 3A) |
| 2/5 = 0.40000 | genuine Family D | empirical floor | P2L3 incidence poset (Prong 3B-β) |
| 27/70 ≈ 0.38571 | skew Family A | empirical SKEW-ARTIFACT | (4,4,2)/(2,0,0); does NOT extend |
| 1/2 = 0.50000 | M_{q+1} = rank-2 subspace lattice F_q² | closed-form theorem | every prime power q (Prong 3B-β) |

### Descent ladder identity

Q = (k+1)/(3k) = 1/3 + 1/(3k) at k ∈ {11, 13, 17} with sporadic e ∈ {11, 39, 187 = 11·17}. Binding-pair Pr = (2k−1)/(3k) → 2/3 as k → ∞. Empirical pointer: inf Q at width 3 = 1/3 (1/3-2/3 conjecture asymptotically sharp on width 3). Ladder confirmed stalled at k=17 within natural one-parameter chain-stretch operators (Prong 3D-α gadget identity Pr[x<y_i] = i/(t+1) proves the structural obstruction).

### Analytic theorems (seven; five NEW today)

1. **T1 (Prong 1) — central-symmetry pair identity** for self-dual 3-row skew: Pr[x<y] = Pr[ρy<ρx]. Plus signed-gap invariance wall (Lemma 2).
2. **T2 (Prong 3A) — Q ≥ 8/21 SHARP** for ALL width-exactly-3 SP posets, ALL n. First analytic-strong of the arc. SP series-convolution induction. Sharp at T*=G⊕G‖point.
3. **T3 (Prong 3D-α) — gadget identity** Pr[x<y_i] = i/(t+1) for point ‖ t-chain; only t=2 yields Q = 1/3.
4. **T4 (Prong 3E-α) — σ-orbit reduction** Q(P) = max over σ-orbit representatives on self-dual posets.
5. **T5 (Prong 3E-α) — expected-rank antisymmetry** r̄(x) + r̄(σx) = n+1.
6. **T6 (Prong 3H-α) — Q-preserving extreme adjunction (ordinal-sum)**: e(P ⊕ R) = e(P)·e(R), Q(P ⊕ R) = max(Q(P), Q(R)), all balances preserved. Corollary: Q(P + ⊤) = Q(P). PROVED closed-form via linear-extension bijection. Generalises Prong 3A's Lemma B from SP to ARBITRARY posets.
7. **T7 (Prong 3H-α) — extreme-reduction**: Q(P) = Q(core(P)) on width-3 posets with incomparable pair; inf{Q(P): width-3} = inf{Q(C): width-3, extreme-reduced}. PROVED by induction on T6.

**Conditional T7 strengthening**: under the **self-dualization hypothesis** (every Q-minimizing extreme-reduced width-3 poset is self-dual — empirically verified through n=11 across 3.16M iso-classes; NOT proved), T7 reduces the floor question to the self-dual core. The self-dualization hypothesis is the cheaper polecat-sized gateway named for Prong 3I-α.

### Four proven structural walls

| # | Prong | Family / class | Wall |
|---|---|---|---|
| W1 | 1 | Family A self-dual skew | box-rotation signed-gap MIRRORS bias, not cancels |
| W2 | 3B-β | Family D finite-geometry incidence | algebraic construction can't produce cofinal-q width-3 |
| W3 | 3B-γ | Family C order-polytope | Ehrhart dilation parameter Q-invariant (scale invariance) |
| W4 | 3E-α | self-dual width-3 | signed-gap Φ-invariance on near-twin σ-orbit MIRRORS bias, not cancels |

Pattern: every NATURAL parameter or symmetry-extension that one might use to derive a Q-lower-bound either MIRRORS bias rather than cancelling it (#1, #4) or is structurally Q-invariant / forced-narrow (#2, #3). The conjecture's natural-lever resistance is structural.

### Two named missing inputs (research-grade, parked)

- **Missing Input A (Prong 1 §5):** forced-relation skew-SYT ratio bound. BFT 1995 best off-the-shelf ≈ 0.2764, below 1/3.
- **Missing Input B (Prong 3E-α §5; sharpened by Prong 3H-α to extreme-reduced self-dual class):** forced-relation order-polytope ratio 6/17·e(P) ≤ e(P+x<y) ≤ 11/17·e(P) on the near-twin σ-orbit binding pair.

Both are special cases of the open width-3 conjecture itself; bigger than polecat-sized. PARKED unless Daniel directs an extended-budget attack.

### One REFUTATION + descent ladder discovery

Prong 3C: Q = 6/17 at width-3 n=10 REFUTES the empirical 14/39 floor; descent ladder Q = 1/3 + 1/(3k) discovered. Mayor + polecat empirical pointer: inf Q on width 3 = 1/3 (asymptotic-sharpness signal).

### Today's sequence (12 prongs, single day)

1 → 2 (V1+V2 GENUINE on SP, SKEW-ARTIFACT confirmed) → 3A (Q ≥ 8/21 SHARP, first analytic-strong) → 3B-β (Family D WALL #2 + 4/11 seed surfaced) → 3B-γ (Family C WALL #3 + NEW-TERRITORY 14/39) → 3C (REFUTATION 14/39 → 6/17, descent ladder identity, asymptotic-sharpness pointer) → 3D-α (ladder stall + σ-subspace + gadget identity T3) → 3E-α (WALL #4 + σ-orbit machinery T4+T5 + Missing Input B named) → 3F-β (self-dual exhaustive n=11/12/13, 71,512 σ-iso classes; 134/375 odd-n family) → 3G-α (full-arena exhaustive n=10/11, 3.16M iso-classes; +1-n self-duality-breakage pattern) → 3H-α (T6+T7 PROVED, publishable consolidation, OUTCOME-4 wall + sharpened Missing Input B + cheap gateway named).

### Open Daniel decision — AP-2 arc-close direction

After today, the arc is at a natural pause with three named follow-up directions:

- **(a) Write-up / publish AS-IS.** The publishable consolidation doc (Prong 3H-α §2) is ready as a stand-alone reader. T6 + T7 are Lean-portable. Cumulative empirical evidence + 4 walls + 7 theorems + named gateways form a clean publishable artifact. The Outcome-4 wall on the analytic Q ≥ 6/17 attempt is honestly stated; the named missing inputs are the natural research-grade follow-ups.
- **(b) Attack the self-dualization hypothesis (Prong 3I-α; polecat-sized).** Closes the conditional in T7 → analytic full-arena reduction to self-dual core. Doesn't yield Q ≥ 6/17 by itself (still needs Missing Input B on the self-dual core) but is the cheaper gateway forward.
- **(c) Attack Missing Input B at research-grade / HPC budget.** Closes Q ≥ 6/17 STRONG if it works; same shape as Prong-1's parked Missing Input A.

PM recommendation: **(a) write-up first + (b) in parallel.** (a) banks the artifact; (b) is cheap; both are non-exclusive. (c) gated on (b)'s outcome.

### Live / queued tickets (Algebraic Program)

- **In flight:** mg-f6d3 (Prong 3I-α: self-dualization hypothesis attack), filed 2026-05-30 morning sweep per (a)+(b) parallel PM recommendation. Mayor dispatch-pinged.
- **Next to file (gated on 3I-α verdict):** Prong 3I-β (analytic Q ≥ 6/17 on now-unconditionally-reduced self-dual core, if 3I-α STRONG); Prong 3I-δ (off-the-self-dual analytic attack, if 3I-α REFUTATION).
- **Parked:** Prong 3B-α (formal closure of Prong 3A non-binding lemmas); Missing Input A (forced-relation skew-SYT ratio bound); Missing Input B (forced-relation order-polytope ratio bound); Prong 3H-β / 3G-β (HPC sweep n≥12 needs ~2·10⁷ to ~1.6·10⁸ classes per level); write-up scoping (audience-undetermined, Daniel-direction-required).

Three options Daniel's: (i) FINISH THE ACTUAL PROOF (R-A + R-BC multi-month); (ii) FINISH A CONDITIONAL PROOF (honest write-up modulo Cheeger gap, weeks); (iii) ABANDON the Cheeger framework. **PM recommendation: (ii) NOW + (i) QUEUED.**

The conjecture is empirically sharp at width 3 with floor 1/3 (descent ladder pointer); no width-3 counterexample exists in the explored algebraic families.
